response.justification: The candidate lacks essential qualifications for the role: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no familiarity with embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are mandatory requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like applications
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX systems as required
No exposure to embedded network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: Absence of Linux kernel modification experience
